_meta.notes: Net agri-food trade balance per country in millions USD. Positive = net exporter, negative = net importer. Item 1842 (Food, Total) preferred; 1841 (Agricultural Products, Total) used as fallback for countries where 1842 is missing. Covered 0 of 174 mapped countries. Most-recent year per country where both export and import values are populated and not flagged as missing.
